apps.name: Lemon Juice Maker
apps.description: A fun and simple casual physics juice game. Tap to squeeze lemons, mix flavors, and hit the target score.

apps.name: Spin Wheel Casual
apps.description: Test your focus and timing in this offline spinning wheel arcade simulator. Earn scores and unlock new styles.

apps.name: Royal Match Triple
apps.description: Match triple cards and clean the board. A challenging offline casual strategy card board game for all ages.

apps.name: Yono Utility Hub
apps.description: A clean utility dashboard listing casual offline game apps, device statistics organizers, and security managers.
